title: The Ultimate Nostalgia Pack
description: Want to relive the old days of Minecraft, while also enjoying the latest and greatest features? The Ultimate Nostalgia Pack has you covered!
body:
IMPORTANT: I am unable to include Modern Beta by b3spectacled, since it's not on Modrinth, so you will have to install it manually. Alternatively, Hybrid Beta by Crystalis7 provides a mix of modern + retro terrain generation.

The Ultimate Nostalgia Pack is a modpack that aims to bring back the old feel of Minecraft, without sacrificing the many great features and content of modern Minecraft. Almost everything in the pack is customizable, with mods carefully selected to provide the best nostalgic experience.

The pack is configured to replicate Beta 1.7.3.

<details>
<summary>RECOMMENDED RESOURCE PACKS (from top to bottom):</summary>

Golden Days Porkchop Addon
Golden Days Base
Beta Continuum
Programmer Art

Note: Only Golden Days Base is on Modrinth.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Included Mods:</summary>

Architectury,
Bobby,
Client Side Noteblocks,
Cloth Config,
Collective,
Concurrent Chunk Management,
Controlling for Fabric,
CreativeCore,
DashLoader,
Debugify,
DynamicFPS,
Entity View Distance,
Entity Culling Fabric,
Fabric API,
Fabric Language Kotlin,
Indium,
Lithium,
Log Cleaner,
Memory Leak Fix,
MixinTrace,
Mixtape,
Mod Menu,
More Culling,
Nostalgic Tweaks,
Reese's Sodium Options,
Remove Reloading Screen,
Searchables,
Sodium,
Sodium Extra,
Starlight,
ThreadTweak,
ToolTip Fix,
Very Many Players,
View Distance Fix,
YetAnotherConfigLib

</details>
